title: Facility-reported greenhouse gas data - Canada.ca
content:
## Facility-reported greenhouse gas data
Canadian facilities are required to report their annual greenhouse gas emissions. We publish this data starting from 2004 to the most recent year of data collected. We also publish overview reports that analyze the latest year’s data, and provide interactive tools and downloadable datasets that allow you to explore facility-level emissions, compare emissions across facilities, and understand changes in these emissions over time.
Facility greenhouse gas reporting: overview of 2024 reported emissions
Looking for previously published data or overview reports? Contact us .
- Online data search : create personalized queries of the reported facility data
- Downloadable emissions data (Excel and CSV) are available on the Open Data Portal: Facility emission totals by greenhouse gas from 2004 to 2024 Facility emission totals by greenhouse gas and by emission source from 2022 to 2024 New: Carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from biomass combustion have been added to the downloadable data files (data available from 2022 onward)
- Facility emission totals by greenhouse gas from 2004 to 2024
- Facility emission totals by greenhouse gas and by emission source from 2022 to 2024
- New: Carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from biomass combustion have been added to the downloadable data files (data available from 2022 onward)
- Interactive map : sort and view greenhouse gas emissions by facility
Data presented here are current as of October 2, 2025. The data provided within this website are for information purposes only. We have conducted a number of data quality checks of the submitted data for compliance purposes and for completeness, and will continue to analyze the data, which may result in periodic updates.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
